title: crataegus calycina var. walokochiana
intro: Crataegus calycina var. walokochiana, commonly known as a hawthorn variety, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its rich content of bioflavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Crataegus calycina var. walokochiana include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. This plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
